code: import React from"react";import{useTranslation}from"../theme/TranslationContext";import{useTheme}from"../theme/useTheme";import{useLanguage}from"../theme/useLanguage";import{useCurrency}from"../theme/useCurrency";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Settings=()=>{const{t}=useTranslation();const{theme,toggleTheme}=useTheme();const{language,toggleLanguage}=useLanguage();const{currency,changeCurrency}=useCurrency();const currencies=[{symbol:'৳',name:'BDT'},{symbol:'$',name:'USD'},{symbol:'€',name:'EUR'},{symbol:'£',name:'GBP'},{symbol:'¥',name:'JPY'}];return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"settings-section",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:t('settings')}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"settings-options",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"setting-item",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("label",{children:[t('darkMode'),":"]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:toggleTheme,className:"toggle-btn",children:theme==='dark'?t('on'):t('off')})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"setting-item",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("label",{children:[t('language'),":"]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:toggleLanguage,className:"toggle-btn",children:language==='en'?'English':'বাংলা'})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"setting-item",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("label",{children:[t('currency'),":"]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("select",{value:currency,onChange:e=>changeCurrency(e.target.value),children:currencies.map(curr=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("option",{value:curr.symbol,children:[curr.symbol," ",curr.name]},curr.symbol))})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"setting-item",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("label",{children:[t('nightMode'),":"]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:toggleTheme,className:"toggle-btn",children:theme==='dark'?t('on'):t('off')})]})]})]});};export default Settings;
